Seasons in Malibu

Luxury Malibu Rehab for Addiction & Mental Health Recovery

Experience comfort and transformative healing at our peaceful luxury treatment center in Malibu. At Seasons in Malibu we offer confidential mental health and substance abuse treatment, with clinical excellence and compassionate life-changing care.

Celebrating 18 Years of Service

424-235-2009
Get Help Now

About Us

Seasons in Malibu - Luxury Rehab Center in California

You have finally decided to take action to change your life. If you are struggling with drug addiction issues, you recognize the disease has overtaken your entire existence, and either is—or is beginning to—destroy many of the things that you hold most dear. We understand how you feel and how difficult it is for you to be here right now. But know, we can help you.

If you are battling mental health issues like trauma, depression, anxiety, PTSD—either together with substance or alcohol abuse, or without—we can help you as well. We are a California State licensed, CARF accredited, world-class treatment center, licensed in both substance abuse and mental health, celebrating over 18 years of service. We help people from all over the world by providing the best rehab care for their recovery.

Get to Know Us

Personalized Treatment Plans

Doctorate Level
One-On-One Therapy

Care at Seasons in Malibu is delivered by a multidisciplinary team of psychologists, Master’s-level case managers, and specialized professionals trained and certified in evidence-based therapeutic modalities. Additionally, all our primary therapists have a Doctorate Degree in Psychology. It is nearly impossible to find any other rehabilitation center for mental health and substance abuse treatment with such a highly educated group of therapists and trained clinicians.

Begin Your Recovery

Affiliations

Why We’re Nationally Recognized for Excellence in Addiction & Mental Health Treatment

Our innovative and personalized treatment method makes us different from other luxury rehabilitation centers. We use an integrated approach that combines evidence-based therapies with alternative therapies such as art therapy, yoga, and mindfulness practices. With our comprehensive approach, we are able to address the complex needs of our clients and provide them with the best possible care at our Malibu rehabilitation center.

  • Up to 65 One-On-One Therapy Sessions Per Month
  • A Multi-Dimensional, Evidence-Based Approach to Treatment
  • Licensed for Both Substance Abuse & Mental Health
  • Doctorate Level One-On-One Therapy
  • A Highly Recognized, Intensive, Medical Professionals Program
  • Innovative and Cutting-Edge Holistic Treatment Modalities
Treatment at Seasons is systemic, integrative, and centered around you. Our personalized approach addresses every aspect of addiction and mental health, tailoring care to your unique needs while helping you achieve sustainable, lifelong recovery.

Outstanding Staff

Seasons in Malibu employs some of the most talented and compassionate addiction and mental health professionals in the country. In addition to being highly qualified—each member of our team has an advanced degree in their field of specialization—they collectively bring decades of experience to their roles. Each member of our staff is committed to helping our clients heal, grow, and recover. In the hands of the most experienced team, you will find the support you need at Seasons in Malibu.
Meet Our Staff

Luxurious Accommodations

Our serene, intimate, and healing-enhancing facilities in Malibu are nestled in one of the finest stretches of our planet. It is an ideal setting for individuals who seek transformative care for addiction and mental health disorders. Additionally, our amenities are second-to-none, making us one of the top rehab centers. Click below to learn more about our location and luxury services.
Tour Our Facility

Well-Earned Reputation

Seasons in Malibu has a 5-star rating by Consumer Affairs and was featured in Newsweek’s Excellence in Dependency, 2019 edition. Over the years, we have collected thousands of individual client surveys and proudly boast a 95% satisfaction rate when clients are asked whether they would recommend Seasons to a friend or a loved one. We are honored to be recognized as one of the best rehabs in the country.
Contact Us

Mental Health Treatment

The Path to Positive Mental Health

Seasons in Malibu offers a dedicated stand-alone mental health treatment center that provides life-changing care for individuals struggling with mental health disorders. Our intimate, luxurious, residential setting creates an environment for personalized treatment and lasting recovery.

  • Depression
  • Anxiety Disorders
  • Complex Trauma
  • Bipolar Disorder
  • Grief and Loss
  • Codependency
Find Out More

Our Amenities

Luxury Rehabilitation Facilities at Seasons in Malibu

Your experience at Seasons in Malibu combines luxury rehab facilities with world-class addiction and mental health treatment. Enjoy ocean views, spacious bedrooms, private bathrooms, and gourmet cuisine while you focus on your recovery journey. Our compassionate staff will tend to your every need so that all you have to do is concentrate on getting healthy and achieving lasting recovery and a fuller and richer life. Seasons in Malibu’s rehab center has all the comforts of home and more. We also offer numerous holistic activities, which might include:

  • Yoga
  • Beach walks
  • Tennis
  • Surfing / Kayaking
  • Meditation
  • Equine Therapy
  • Nutrition therapy
  • Art therapy
  • Massage
  • Acupuncture
  • Hiking
  • Craniosacral Therapy
  • Golfing / Fishing
  • Access to a Private Gym
Check Out Our Amenities

Testimonials

“I did not think it possible to get such quality of care anywhere… I was treated with such kindness and understanding. I was quickly assigned a treatment team that literally worked around the clock to help me get my life back. My only regret was not reaching out to Seasons sooner because living a sober life has been amazing! Thank you!”
MeredithNew York
“Seasons in Malibu offers world class therapy and treatment for a wide range of conditions and addictions. I can say with full confidence that it changed if not saved my life. Furthermore, the accommodations are top notch and you will transform your life in a luxurious setting. If you’re in need of such therapy I can’t imagine there is a better option in North America.”
KippArizona
“From the minute I walked through the doors I felt welcome. The days were full of therapy and fun. The houses are insanely clean and beautiful. The food was like a 5-star restaurant. The therapists are so skilled and professional. They will love you at Seasons till you learn to love yourself again. Seasons in Malibu taught me how to get through even the toughest times in my life.”
TracyAlaska
"Could not recommend Seasons more to anyone considering! Was in a rough spot before coming there and they helped get me through the hardest parts of my addiction and then, more importantly, address the underlying issues/traumas I had been coping with in negative ways. Despite feeling very ready to re-enter the world, I was very bummed to say goodbye to the staff whom I had gotten so close with - truly awesome and loving people who helped me so much."
NateCalifornia
"Before entering Seasons I read reviews that said this program saved their lives. It gave me hope, but I didn't fully believe it because it seemed too good to be true. Now that I've completed the program I can 100% say it saved my life."
KaceyCalifornia
"After a previous stint in rehab, I found Seasons in Malibu as my next (and final!) landing spot on my sobriety journey. When I arrived, my anxiety was quickly put to ease thanks to the welcoming staff and comfortable, clean facilities. Most importantly, the treatment I received over the next 30 days was tailored perfectly to my situation and very effective. I feel very fortunate to have found this place and allowing the friendly, knowledgeable staff to assist me in starting a new, exciting chapter in my life."
DrewCalifornia
See Our Consumer Reviews

Start Your Recovery Journey with Us

Explore Seasons in Malibu's Luxury Rehab Program Today

At Seasons in Malibu, you’ll experience compassionate care in a serene oceanside environment. Our luxury treatment center offers comprehensive services for alcohol and drug addiction and mental health challenges, providing the perfect setting for lasting, life-changing recovery.

Ready to learn more? Our dedicated team is here to answer your questions about our programs and services. Reach out to us online or call us directly at 424-235-2009 to start a confidential conversation about your needs.

About Us

  • Home
  • About Us

    • About Seasons in Malibu

    Addiction and mental health disorders often occur in tandem, with one condition fueling the effects of the other. To effectively treat both of these disorders, a program must include a dual diagnosis with extensive mental health treatment to begin healing any emotional or psychological damage. As a premier provider of luxury dual diagnosis treatment in Southern California, we offer personalized programs designed to help individuals regain control and build a healthier future.

    We are committed to providing high-quality addiction and mental health treatment for people who are ready to make a positive change in their lives. We employ a team of experienced professionals that have over a decade of working together. If you’re interested in learning more about our addiction treatment center, reach out to our friendly team today online or at 424-235-2009.

    About Seasons in Malibu’s Luxurious Facility

    Our campus is located on a bluff in Malibu, CA,  just outside of Los Angeles, offering stunning ocean views and easy beach access. We have designed a welcoming environment that uses our natural surroundings as a setting for group and individual therapy sessions. Our team is proud to help people identify their addiction and mental health issues and work collaboratively to create an individualized treatment plan to begin a recovery journey.

    Activities at Seasons in Malibu

    During treatment, our clients have access to a variety of holistic activities designed to support their recovery and promote a healthier lifestyle. As they progress through their treatment plan, they have opportunity to try new activities or rediscover old hobbies that were neglected due to poor mental health or addiction.

    The activities we offer but aren’t limited to:

    • Yoga
    • Beach walks
    • Swimming
    • Surfing
    • Kayaking
    • Meditation
    • Equine therapy
    • Nutrition therapy
    • Art therapy
    • Massage

    Our Treatment Programs

    Every person is unique, so treatment for addiction and mental health disorders should be customized to fit the needs of each individual. Our team works with each client to determine which treatment programs are suitable for their recovery.

    Our treatment programs include:

    Medical Management

    Our team is qualified to administer medication to help our clients safely and comfortably overcome the initial stages of treatment and ease any withdrawal symptoms. Individual medication management plans begin with a thorough assessment of information such as medical history, amount of drug or alcohol use, and the existence of mental health disorders.

    Family Diagnosis

    When someone deals with mental health and addiction issues, relationships with family members are often damaged or destroyed. The family diagnosis program helps reestablish connections among family members and explore how to communicate more efficiently with each other.

    Relapse Prevention

     We want to set our clients up for success in recovery for years after they’ve left our doors. Our relapse prevention program teaches healthy coping strategies so that our clients won’t fall back into old patterns of behavior.

About Seasons in Malibu

Addiction and mental health disorders often occur in tandem, with one condition fueling the effects of the other. To effectively treat both of these disorders, a program must include a dual diagnosis with extensive mental health treatment to begin healing any emotional or psychological damage. As a premier provider of luxury dual diagnosis treatment in Southern California, we offer personalized programs designed to help individuals regain control and build a healthier future.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

We are committed to providing high-quality addiction and mental health treatment for people who are ready to make a positive change in their lives. We employ a team of experienced professionals that have over a decade of working together. If you’re interested in learning more about our  addiction treatment center, reach out to our friendly team today online or at 424-235-2009 .

About Seasons in Malibu’s Luxurious Facility

 Our campus is located on a bluff in Malibu, CA,  just outside of Los Angeles, offering stunning ocean views and easy beach access. We have designed a welcoming environment that uses our natural surroundings as a setting for group and individual therapy sessions. Our team is proud to help people identify their addiction and mental health issues and work collaboratively to create an individualized treatment plan to begin a recovery journey.

 
 

Activities at Seasons in Malibu

During treatment, our clients have access to a variety of holistic activities designed to support their recovery and promote a healthier lifestyle. As they progress through their treatment plan, they have opportunity to try new activities or rediscover old hobbies that were neglected due to poor mental health or addiction.

The activities we offer but aren’t limited to:

 
Yoga

Beach walks

Swimming

Surfing

Kayaking

Meditation

Equine therapy

Nutrition therapy

Art therapy

Massage
 

 
 

Our Treatment Programs

Every person is unique, so treatment for addiction and mental health disorders should be customized to fit the needs of each individual. Our team works with each client to determine which treatment programs are suitable for their recovery.

Our treatment programs include:

Medical Management

Our team is qualified to administer medication to help our clients safely and comfortably overcome the initial stages of treatment and ease any withdrawal symptoms. Individual medication management plans begin with a thorough assessment of information such as medical history, amount of drug or alcohol use, and the existence of mental health disorders.

Family Diagnosis

When someone deals with mental health and addiction issues, relationships with family members are often damaged or destroyed. The family diagnosis program helps reestablish connections among family members and explore how to communicate more efficiently with each other.

Relapse Prevention

 We want to set our clients up for success in recovery for years after they’ve left our doors. Our relapse prevention program teaches healthy coping strategies so that our clients won’t fall back into old patterns of behavior.

    • Admissions for Addiction & Mental Health Treatment

    The Seasons in Malibu admissions process is based on our philosophy of respecting our clients and their loved ones, as well as ensuring that their specific needs are met. When you call our team at 424-235-2009, you will be contacting a trained admissions counselor who can personally take you through the process of admission to the addiction or mental health treatment programs at Seasons in Malibu. Or, you can contact our admissions counselors online to learn more about the in-take process by emailing us at admissions@seasonsmalibu.com.

    Our Seasons in Malibu Admissions Counselors

    Your admissions counselor will stay with you from that first phone call until you arrive at our Malibu treatment center.

    During the admissions process, our counselors will:

    • Explain the fee structure of treatment and policies of payment and insurance support
    • Help you arrange transportation to Seasons and any assistance in transport
    • Describe what to bring with you to our Malibu rehab and what to leave at home
      Answer any other questions you may have

    Upon arrival, your admissions counselor will personally greet you and assist you through the initial rehab and mental health treatment admissions process. Accompanying your admissions counselor at your arrival will be one of our skilled and compassionate client advocates. Your client advocate will give you an orientation, provide you with the materials required for your treatment program, and explain your schedule while in treatment.

    Tour Our Facility

    View Photos

    You will be given a tour of our beautiful campus, which overlooks one of Malibu’s most beautiful beaches. Throughout your stay at our luxury drug rehab, our staff will strive to ensure you get what you need and that your treatment is flawlessly executed. Our client advocates will get you settled into your room, help you know what you can expect to happen, and be available day and night if you have any questions. You will never be without a way to ask for help or get your questions answered during your time with us.

    Within a short time after arrival, you will have a medical assessment done by one of our medical doctors, who will supervise any detoxification required and give specific instructions to our staff and the client regarding their detox. Our team will take the doctor’s orders and execute them with attention to detail and care. Depending on your addiction, the quantity of use, and your substance of choice, including dangerous prescription drugs, you may be resting more during the first few days after arrival. We intend to get you up and moving through treatment as quickly and comfortably as possible, but we want you to take whatever rest you need first.

    When you experience your first meal at Seasons in Malibu, you will discover another of our differences from other residential treatment centers. Our executive chefs ensure every meal is crafted with exceptional attention to quality, taste, freshness, and health, delivering a true gourmet experience. There are plenty of snacks and drinks between meals to keep you hydrated, focused, and healthy.

    All the while, a treatment team, including doctors, psychologists, and holistic practitioners, will be meeting frequently together to focus on your individual treatment program. They will constantly be honing and fine-tuning your individual program for maximum effect to speed you on your way to long-term sobriety.

    Start Your Recovery Journey - Contact Seasons in Malibu Admissions Today!

    Come to Seasons in Malibu and tour our facility, meet with our clinical staff, and find out for yourself why our personalized, one-on-one approach to addiction and mental health treatment makes us one of the best drug rehab centers for you or a loved one. If you or a loved one is struggling with addiction or mental health challenges, reach out to one of our compassionate admissions counselors at 424-235-2009. We offer a free, no-obligation conversation about how Seasons in Malibu can support your recovery journey. You can also email our admissions counselors at admissions@seasonsmalibu.com.
